reasoning: The market for Meta having the top AI model at the end of 2025 is currently priced around 0.8%. Meta's open-source model releases (like Llama 3) perform excellently but haven't consistently held the absolute top spot on the ChatBot Arena Leaderboard, mainly because competitors like Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google release proprietary models closer to the frontier. Given the incoming wave of "next-gen" models like GPT-5, Grok 3, Gemini 2.0, and Claude 4, and Meta's usual timeline of mid-year releases (like Llama 3 in July), it is highly unlikely Meta will hold the very top spot exactly on December 31. I will align closely with the market baseline of 0.8% but place mine slightly above at 1%.
